title: Full-Time Math Teacher(1-1/2-1 Teaching) (JC 1 & JC 2 / Gr 11–12)
description:
A Low-Stress Teaching Career in a Supportive Centre Environment

MathVision has been operating in Singapore for 18 years, and in that time, we’ve taught over 20,000 students.

You’ll be joining a well-established organisation with a strong reputation and a long history of supporting teachers.

- All lessons are conducted 1-1 or 2-1 at a table (never in a classroom or in large groups)

- You’ll teach using a fully prepared curriculum with worksheets, notes, and question banks already created for you. So, you do not need to worry about creating your own content.

If you enjoy guiding students step-by-step and explaining ideas clearly, this role will feel natural, manageable, and fulfilling.

Why This Role Stands Out

  • Low-Stress Teaching (No Classroom and No Discipline Issues)

You teach at a table, with 1 student or 2 students at a time.

  • All Curriculum & Materials Provided

Every topic comes with ready-made worksheets, notes, and structured methods.

You focus on teaching, not preparing materials.

  • Clear Training & Daily Support

We guide you through our teaching methods, and you work alongside 250 other full-time teachers who support one another every day.

  • 18 Years of Experience, 20,000+ Students Taught

A long-standing organisation with deep experience and consistent demand year-round.

Simple Walk-In Interview

Visit us any day.


Flexible and provides generous leave benefits:

- Annual Leave

- Medical Leave

- Family Care Leave

- Birthday Leave

- Overtime

- Hospitalisation Leave

- Public Holidays

- Medical Insurance (General Physician, Specialist, Hospitalisation, Dental Plan)

postedCompany.description:
Mathvision Enrichment Centre was founded in 2007 by Divesh Shah with the intention of supporting students in their academic journey. Once started with 1 student has now become a strong academic institution with more than 200 teachers and 4,000 students happily studying.


Most sessions are taught on either a 1-1 or 2-1 basis. 


Subjects offered are Math, Combined Science, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Economics, Business, ICT, Computer Science as well as some competitive exams.


Curriculums taught include GCSE, IGCSE, ED Excel, MYP, IB, A Levels, O Levels, PSLE, AP Courses and Australian Board.


Our passion, mission, and vision is to ensure that each and every student is supported in their academic journey so that they can be accepted into their dream university.
postedCompany.name: MATHVISION ENRICHMENT CENTRE PTE. LTD.
